name: Elegant Embrace
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: [AttackerName] stylishly struts up to [TargetName] with dance-like swaying motions, each step punctuated by the rhythmic clicking of her heels, heightened by the mesmerizing bouncing of her heavy bust in its skimpy confines, and accented by the sweet smile on [AttackerHisOrHer] lips.|n|Left dazed and horny by the eye-catching approach, [TargetName] can only blink in surprise as [AttackerHeOrShe] suddenly presses [AttackerHisOrHer] plush breasts against [TargetHisOrHer] chest, drapes [AttackerHisOrHer] arms over [TargetHisOrHer] shoulders, and pulls [TargetHimOrHer] into a deep, passionate kiss, [AttackerHisOrHer] seductive half-lidded eyes gazing intensely into his as [AttackerHisOrHer] tongue greedily toys with [TargetHisOrHer] mouth.
miss: |f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|SternGlare|n|[AttackerName] stylishly struts up to [TargetName] with dance-like swaying motions, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to keep [TargetHisOrHer] wits about [TargetHimOrHer] and not fall under the sway of [AttackerHisOrHer] captivating show, [TargetHisOrHer] lack of interest bringing a miffed pout to the succubus' luscious lips.
statusOutcome: And with the close-contact, ravenous passionate kissing enhanced by the glamourous sex appeal of her presence, [TargetName] can only swoon in her grasp with charmed-out bliss...
